sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_null (id Int32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_null (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 10), (3, NULL);
UPDATE test_null SET value = 5 WHERE id = 1 AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_null WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_null WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
